message:
fix(server): Replace Cx::for_testing() with production context and fix clippy warnings

- Replace Cx::for_testing() in AsyncStdioTransport::close() with
  Cx::for_request_with_budget(Budget::INFINITE) for proper production use
- Convert redundant closures to PoisonError::into_inner per clippy
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to spawn_task after poison recovery
  code made it exceed the 100-line limit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
